name: Wound Clerid
descs: When hitting an enemy with a Skill that inflicts [Laceration] Potency or 'Unique Bleed', inflict 4 [Laceration] Potency.
When hitting an enemy with a Skill that inflicts [Laceration] Potency or 'Unique Bleed', or with a Wrath Affinity Skill, inflict 5 [Laceration] Potency.
When hitting an enemy with a Skill that inflicts [Laceration] Potency or 'Unique Bleed', or with a Wrath Affinity Skill, inflict 5 [Laceration] Potency and +1 [Laceration] Count.
